items: Kyle Bradish blanked The Angels for 8.0 innings, striking out 9 in Baltimore's 6-1 win.
Foster Griffin held down Philadelphia for 7.1 innings, striking out 9 in Washington's 4-1 win.
San Diego pitching combined to shut out Atlanta, 1-0.
The Mets pitching combined to shut out Chicago Cubs, 0-0.
St. Louis walked off Arizona, 3-2 — one of 4 one-run finishes across the league.
